fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period that you want to view.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies purchase statistics for each vendor for a period of time, starting on the date that you specify.

fields.name: Balance Due (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the balance due to the vendor, in local currency.

fields.name: Purchases (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purchases, in local currency.
